message:
style: alphabetize crush connector entries in probe roots and probe paths

Sort the crush connector's match arms into alphabetical order within
default_probe_roots() and default_probe_paths_tilde(), consistent with
the ordering of all other connectors in these functions. The copilot_cli
entry was between continue and cursor, so crush now sits between
copilot_cli and cursor.

No behavioral change — only reordering of match arm positions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
